name: Modern Treasury
description: Payment operations platform with APIs for ACH, wire, RTP, FedNow, and real-time ledgering.

seo.title: Modern Treasury — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Modern Treasury: Payment operations platform with APIs for ACH, wire, RTP, FedNow, and real-time ledgering.

when_to_use: ACH, wire, and RTP payment operations with real-time ledgering API
FedNow and RTP real-time payment initiation for US fintech products
Payment workflow automation with embedded double-entry accounting
Reconciliation and ledgering for complex money movement fintech applications

pros: Deep ACH, wire, RTP, FedNow coverage
cons: Higher pricing tier for operations platform
review.verdict: Best-in-class US bank payment operations stack — right when you move money, not when you accept cards.
review.best_for: Platforms and fintechs running high-volume bank transfers and ledgering in the US
review.not_for: Merchants who mainly need card acceptance

developer_experience.reason: Strong payment ops APIs and SDKs
